targets.rawSql: SELECT $__timeGroup(recorded_at, '5m') AS "time", avg(rssi_dbm) as "RSSI" FROM network_quality WHERE $__timeFilter(recorded_at) GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1
SELECT $__timeGroup(recorded_at, '5m') AS "time", avg(latency_ms) as "Latency" FROM network_quality WHERE $__timeFilter(recorded_at) GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

SELECT $__timeGroup(recorded_at, '5m') AS "time", avg(packet_loss_pct) as "Packet Loss %", max(reconnect_count) as "Reconnects" FROM network_quality WHERE $__timeFilter(recorded_at) GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1
